from appium import webdriver
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

def login_trial_user(driver, username="trial_user", password="trial_password"):
    wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
    
    # Enter username/email
    username_field = wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "username_field")))
    username_field.send_keys(username)
    
    # Enter password
    password_field = driver.find_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "password_field")
    password_field.send_keys(password)
    
    # Tap login button
    login_button = wait.until(EC.element
